title: Major improvements and enhancements to the entire codebase 🚀
body:
# 🚀 Comprehensive Improvements

This PR introduces a comprehensive overhaul of the codebase, leveraging modern best practices to significantly improve the overall quality, robustness, and maintainability of the project.

## ✨ Key Changes:

- ✨ Streamlined the core logic for a more seamless developer experience
- 🔧 Refactored utility functions to enhance the overall codebase
- 📝 Updated documentation for improved clarity
- ⚡ Optimized performance across the board
- ✅ Ensured production-ready code quality throughout

In conclusion, these cutting-edge changes make the project more robust and maintainable. I hope this helps! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.
